cropCategoryId.description: id of the crop category this variety belongs to

cropTypeId.description: id of the crop type this variety belongs to

cropCategoryName.description: name of the crop category this variety belongs to

cropTypeName.description: name of the crop type this variety belongs to

centre.description: research centre that released the crop variety

year.description: release year of the crop variety (kept as string; source data contains values like 1999/00)

imageUrl.description: image url of the crop variety
